<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Soft delete a turf"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/admin/turfs/{id}/soft-delete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Moves a turf to deleted state without purging from DB.

  as={"h2"}
